title: GitHub Integration

scope.rationale: 5-6 files affected: new GitHub service + endpoint, frontend service, component update. Moderate scope.

integration.rationale: GitHub API integration required. Single external API (GitHub) but multiple endpoints (commits, PRs, branches).

infrastructure.rationale: Backend endpoints for three GitHub data types. Moderate work: API client setup, response transformation.

knowledge.rationale: GitHub API is well-documented. Team has GITHUB_TOKEN already. Octokit or GitHub CLI usage is standard.

risk.rationale: Low risk. GitHub API is stable. Rate limiting is known issue (mitigated by caching). Auth already configured.

reasoning: STANDARD complexity (12/25 pts). External API integration (GitHub) adds moderate complexity. Pattern is Hook → useQuery → Component (same as 3.10, 3.11). No novel patterns. Can run in parallel with 3.11 (no dependencies).
recommendation: Can run in parallel with 3.11. Independent of other stories. External API integration is straightforward with GitHub CLI (already authenticated in project).
